# Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA)

Grow your money tax-free and take it out whenever you want without penalty.1

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/itrade/images/SPECIAL_OFFER_grey_pill.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

Earn up to $3,750 with a new eligible registered account.\*

[Learn more.](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/campaigns/investment-offer.html)

\*Min deposit and eligible PAC required. Conditions apply.

[Open a TFSA now](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/tax-free-savings-account.html#RFYWFY1)

[See if it's right for you](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/tax-free-savings-account.html#RFYWFY)

[Explore Scotia Smart Investor](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/scotia-smart-investor.html) [Talk to an advisor](https://hello.scotiabank.com/book/customer-flag)

## What is a TFSA?

A TFSA is an all-purpose savings account that offers the flexibility to save for many goals in one account. Your savings grow over time tax-free, and you can withdraw your money whenever you need it.

## Benefits of a TFSA

Previouschevron-left

Nextchevron-right

![no tax](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/common/icons/gic/large-no-tax.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

Any investment income earned within the TFSA is tax free.

![withdrawl](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/advice/images/withdrawl-alt_icon.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

Withdrawals can be made from a TFSA tax free anytime.1

![paper reports](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/advice/images/report-withdrawal_icon.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

TFSAs do not affect your eligibility for federal government benefits.

![money growing](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/advice/images/withdrawl-amount_icon.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

Unused TFSA contribution room can be carried forward to later years, as long as you maintain Canadian residency.

## Make the most of your TFSA

![question mark](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/question/question-colour.svg)

**Why a TFSA?**

A TFSA is a flexible way to grow your money. You can use it to save for your short and long-terms goals, such as retirement, a car, vacation, wedding, buying a home, or emergency savings.

* * *

![pie chart](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/donut-chart/donut-chart-colour.svg)

**How do you invest inside a TFSA?**

Your TFSA is a registered account that can hold a variety of savings and [investment products](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing.html) within that account, such as cash, GICs, mutual funds, and even stocks and bonds.

* * *

![gauge](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/credit-score/credit-score-colour.svg)

**What about contribution limits?**

Every year you gain contribution room in your TFSA. As of January 2025, you can contribute $7,000 annually in your TFSA, plus any unused contribution amount you may have accumulated. However, it’s important to make sure you don’t over-contribute.2

## How would you like to build your TFSA?

### Guided investing with Scotia Smart Investor

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/d2d/d2d-redesign/special_offer.svg)

Earn a 1.5% cash bonus on transfers, up to $3,750.\* [Learn more.](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/campaigns/investment-offer.html)

* * *

- Invest in mutual funds, GICs, and more.


- Reach your goals with personalized recommendations. [Learn more.](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/scotia-smart-investor.html)


[Sign in to online banking](https://hello.scotiabank.com/investment/context?planCode=TFS&language=en)

### Self-directed investing with Scotia iTRADE®

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/d2d/d2d-redesign/special_offer.svg)

New clients can get up to $10,000 and 50 free trades.† [Learn more.](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/winter-offer-triage.html)

* * *

- Start direct investing online to trade stocks, ETFs, and more.

- Track your entire financial picture, all on one screen. [Learn more.](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home.html)


[Get started with Scotia iTRADE](https://ico.scotiabank.com/en/public)

### New to Scotia or want to speak to an advisor?

Open an account and get personalized investment support from a Scotiabank advisor.

[Talk to an advisor](https://hello.scotiabank.com/book/customer-flag)

### Use our tax-free savings account (TFSA) calculator3

Whether it’s for short or long-term savings, discover the power of tax-free growth with a TFSA.

[Use the TFSA calculatorUse the TFSA calculator](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/tax-free-savings-account/tfsa-calculator.html)

## TFSA contribution amounts

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Year** | **Amount** |
| **2025** | $7,000 |
| **2024** | $7,000 |
| **2023** | $6,500 |
| **2022** | $6,000 |
| **2021** | $6,000 |

### 2009 — 2020 TFSA Contribution amounts

| Year | Amount |
| --- | --- |
| 2020 | $6,000 |
| 2019 | $6,000 |
| 2018 | $5,500 |
| 2017 | $5,500 |
| 2016 | $5,500 |
| 2015 | $10,000 |
| 2014 | $5,500 |
| 2013 | $5,500 |
| 2012 | $5,000 |
| 2011 | $5,000 |
| 2010 | $5,000 |
| 2009 | $5,000 |

As a tax resident of Canada, if you were at least 18 years of age and have reached the age of majority in the province where you set up the account, you could contribute at least $7,000 up to $102,000, if you opened a TFSA in 2025. As a newcomer to Canada, your contribution room starts accruing the year you become a resident of Canada.

Refer to [TFSA FAQs](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/tax-free-savings-account/faq.html) for additional information.

## Building your TFSA

Previouschevron-left

Nextchevron-right

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/investments/F25_Tile_686x386_GIC.png)

### Guaranteed Investment Certificates (GICs)

A worry-free investment product that keeps your principal investment safe and has a guaranteed rate of return.

[Learn about GICs](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/guaranteed-investment-certificates.html)

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/investments/F25_Tile_686x386_MF.png)

### Mutual Funds

Mutual funds deliver instant diversification and professional money management in a cost-effective and convenient solution.

[Grow your money](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/mutual-fund.html)

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/common/imagery/visual-id/686-x-386/GettyImages-1329251224.png)

### Savings Accelerator Account

Earn a competitive interest rate on your money as it grows, with no monthly account fee.

Available in registered§ and non-registered plans.

[Accelerate your savings](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/bank-accounts/savings-accounts/savings-accelerator-account.html)

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/investments/4845059_FY26%20Inv_%20Essentials_686x386_tile.jpg)

### **Scotia Essentials Portfolios™**

Cost-effective ETFs and mutual funds, together in one portfolio. Scotia Essentials Portfolios.

[Learn more\\
\\
Learn more about Scotia Essentials](https://www.scotiafunds.com/en/home/portfolio-solutions/scotia-essentials-portfolios.html)

## Build a plan for your future with Scotiabank

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/complete/complete-colour.svg)

Get personalized advice from our team of advisors and investment specialists across Canada.

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/complete/complete-colour.svg)

Connect with us in a way that’s convenient for you. Scotia advisors are available in every branch to help you understand, plan, and execute the right financial plan.

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/complete/complete-colour.svg)

Monitor your investments digitally with online and mobile banking. Our [digital banking guides](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/bank-your-way/digital-banking-guide/investments.html) show you how to take care of your banking using your mobile phone, tablet, or computer.

![](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/online/online-colour.svg)

### Open a TFSA

Start growing your money tax free with our TFSA options.

Apply now


![scotiabank branch](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/branch/branch-colour.svg)

### Online appointment booking

A quick, easy, and secure way to connect with a Scotiabank advisor matched to your needs.

[Book an appointment now](https://hello.scotiabank.com/book/customer-flag)

![scotiabank advisor](https://www.scotiabank.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/contact-us/contact-us-colour.svg)

### Have a question?

We’re ready to give you advice.

[Call us at 1-888-777-4614](tel:18887774614)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is a TFSA and how does it work?

A Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA) is an all-purpose savings account that offers the flexibility to save for many goals in one account. Your savings grow over time tax-free, and you can withdraw your money whenever you need it.

### How do I invest with my TFSA?

Your TFSA is a registered account that can hold a variety of savings and investment products within that account, such as cash, GICs, mutual funds, and even stocks and bonds.

### How much can I contribute to my TFSA?

Every year you gain contribution room in your TFSA. As of January 2025, you can contribute $7,000 annually in your TFSA, plus any unused contribution amount you may have accumulated.

#### Not sure if this is the account for you?

##### This account might not be right if you

- Do not have available TFSA contribution room
- Want to be able to make contributions that can be tax deductible - if so, consider a Registered Retirement Savings Plan

##### Discover better options

Full terms and conditions can be found here: [https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/campaigns/investment-offer.html](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/campaigns/investment-offer.html#tc)

1

The amount you withdraw can be put back into your TFSA starting the following year without impacting your contribution room. Specific product restrictions may also apply. Annual contribution limits: $5,000 for 2009-2012; $5,500 for 2013-2014; $10,000 for 2015; $5,500 for 2016-2018; $6,000 for 2019 – 2022, $6,500 for 2023 and $7,000 for 2024-2025.

For complete information on your contribution room, please visit the [Canada Revenue Agency website](https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/tax/registered-plans-administrators/pspa/mp-rrsp-dpsp-tfsa-limits-ympe.html).

2

If you over-contribute to your TFSA, then the excess amount will be taxed at 1% for every month it’s in your TFSA.

3

Enter up to $102,000 which is the maximum contribution limit in the year 2025 if you have never contributed before.

†

Full terms and conditions can be found here: [https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/direct-investing.html](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/investing/direct-investing.html#tc)

®

Registered trademark of The Bank of Nova Scotia, used under license.

§

The Scotiabank Savings Accelerator Account may be opened within the following registered investment accounts - TFSA, RRSP, RESP, RRIF and RDSP.
